chunks.text:
production-ready, cross-platform applications and systems.

He designs and develops applications for Android, iOS, Windows, and
macOS using Flutter. His work includes both user-facing applications
and internal platforms used by educational institutions.

Krishnapal Sendhav has worked on large-scale student learning platforms
used by more than 50,000 active users. These platforms support learning,
content consumption, live classes, and real-time student–teacher
interactions.

His engineering focus is on system architecture, scalability,
performance optimization, real-time systems, and long-term
maintainability of production software.

EDUCATION & EARLY JOURNEY

Krishnapal Sendhav completed his Bachelor’s of Technology from
Mahakal Institute of Technology with First Division.

He built his first website at the age of 17, which marked the beginning
of his interest in software development and system building.

Krishnapal Sendhav is currently 23 years old.

PROFESSIONAL PROJECTS



One of his primary projects is a Student Learning Platform that
supports video-based learning, real-time chat, live classes, polls,
file sharing, and AI-powered doubt resolution. This platform includes
secure content delivery using custom DRM mechanisms to protect
educational content.

He has built a Live Classes Platform with real-time features such as
live chat, polls, Q&A, file sharing, and screen sharing. The system is
designed to handle live student participation and session management
in production environments.

Krishnapal Sendhav developed a Content Upload and Processing Pipeline
that converts uploaded videos into multiple quality formats, encrypts
media content, and uploads it to the server in an optimized manner.
This system was his own proposed idea and resulted in approximately
35% server cost reduction.

He has worked on a ClassIO Management Application used by educational
institutes to manage content, analytics, and operations. The app
includes AI-assisted features such as smart reply suggestions,
automated responses, and analytics dashboards.

Krishnapal Sendhav built an App Builder Feature that allows institutes
to customize application layouts dynamically from a management
interface. This system supports no-code configuration, dynamic UI
rendering, theme customization, and real-time preview of changes.

He implemented a Video-to-Quiz AI Pipeline that automatically
generates quizzes from video content for student assessment and
evaluation.

Krishnapal Sendhav is also working on an AI Agentic Chatbot system
capable of context-aware conversations and autonomous task-oriented
workflows. The chatbot integrates with existing platforms and operates
within defined system boundaries.

BACKEND & SYSTEMS



On the backend, Krishnapal Sendhav has designed and implemented
production-ready APIs using Node.js. These APIs support content
consumption tracking, engagement systems, and backend workflows
required by learning platforms.

He has extensive experience using Firebase for backend infrastructure,
including Firebase Realtime Database for live interactions, session
and participant state management for live classes, and Firebase Cloud
Messaging for event-driven notifications.

His backend work emphasizes reliability, real-time synchronization,
and clean integration between frontend and backend systems.

APPLIED AI EXPERIENCE

Krishnapal Sendhav works on applied AI systems used in production
environments. His AI experience includes AI-powered doubt resolution
systems, video-to-quiz automation pipelines, agentic chatbot workflows,
and AI-assisted content processing.

His focus is on practical AI integration and workflow automation
rather than model training or research.

OPEN SOURCE & PACKAGE ENGINEERING

Krishnapal Sendhav has developed and modified Flutter packages
involving system utilities, device-level access, external screen
handling, platform-channel integrations, and custom extensions to
open-source PDF rendering libraries.

PERSONAL PROJECTS



Krishnapal Sendhav has built several personal projects to explore
systems and infrastructure concepts.

One such project is a Servlet-based self-hosted file server that allows
hosting files on a local server and exposing an IP address for fetching
content. This system was used to stream movies from a mobile device to
a TV within the same local network with minimal quality loss.

Another personal project is DailyPal, a personal productivity and
social platform that supports posts, multi-user interactions,
real-time chat, to-do management, and note-taking. DailyPal also
integrates Google Gemini for AI-assisted features, functioning as a
personal social and productivity ecosystem.

HOBBIES & INTERESTS

Krishnapal Sendhav enjoys console gaming and regularly plays on a
PlayStation 5. He is interested in learning new technologies and
actively explores emerging tools, frameworks, and platforms.

He also spends time on research and development activities, focusing
on debugging complex problems, analyzing system issues, and
understanding root causes to improve software reliability and design.

CURRENT ROLE & AVAILABILITY

Krishnapal Sendhav currently works at ClassIO, contributing to core
product development, system design, and feature ownership across
multiple platforms.

He is open to senior software engineering roles, cross-platform
application opportunities, freelance or contract projects, and
startup collaborations.

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India
GitHub: https://github.com/krishnapalsendhav
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/krishnapal-sendhav/
Email: krishnapalsendhav591@gmail.com
